images.alt: Home Medix HM-KV 5 LPM oxygen concentrator — white chassis with humidifier bottle, HM logo visible

Home Medix differentiators.One-Touch SOS Alert: Yes — high-volume audible alarm button for summoning a nearby attendant (local siren; no mobile app or telecom channel)
Home Medix differentiators.Warranty: 3 years or 10,000 hours of operation, whichever comes first

faqs.q: What is the HM-KV's oxygen purity?
faqs.a: 93% ± 3% across the flow range of 0.5–5 L/min, per the published technical specification. This is the standard medical-grade purity band for PSA home concentrators.

faqs.q: Is the HM-KV approved for use in India?
faqs.a: Yes. Home Medix lists ISO 9001 and ISO 13485 certifications and CDSCO approval for the HM-KV. It is designed to run on AC 230V / 50Hz with ±10% tolerance.

faqs.q: How loud is the HM-KV at bedside distance?
faqs.a: The published specification is ≤ 40 dB (field-verified). That sits below the common 45 dB bedside threshold and ties the Nidek Nuvo Lite as the quietest 5 LPM on the Indian market.
3 years or 10,000 hours of operation, whichever comes first — a standard home-stationary concentrator warranty term.

description_text: The HM-KV is Home Medix's 5 LPM home stationary oxygen concentrator, designed for long-term home oxygen therapy across the Indian market. Published specs cover 0.5–5 L/min continuous flow, 93% ± 3% oxygen concentration, ≤ 40 dB sound level (field-verified), 320 VA draw at 230V, and a 13 kg cabinet. The unit carries ISO 9001 + ISO 13485 + CDSCO approval and ships with a 3-year / 10,000-hour warranty.
